original: This girl is big all over. Every aspect of her, from height, to muscle tone, to personality, screams “I will fuck you up and have fun doing it!” Sporting a heavy crowbar and a metal-augmented fist, she’s ready to dish out a beating to anyone who dares to get in the way of the riot, and right now, that’s you.
